title: Mas Effect Updated
description:
This and updated 1.21.11 vesrion of the mas effect mod.
All ideas, mod pictures, videos, and descriptions were made by MasUN0. He is the original maker of this mod. I simply updated it for 1.21.11. check out his orginal one
body:
New mod:
https://modrinth.com/mod/pvp-club-live Live win leaderboard pvp club minemen coming soon.


<details>
<summary>Live Leaderboard preveiw </summary>

  ![mace gm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce8ea007791770ad33b05cf64fc347ec6e990159.png)

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df6edf5283c11a6f7b966691249cfc250ceb3676.png)
</details>





This is a mod that alredy was made but updated by me merric check out the orgnial maker [MasUN0](https://modrinth.com/user/MasUN0) and their [mas effect project](https://modrinth.com/mod/mas-effects) 

The following images and discrpition is all from them I only recreated the code for 1.21.11 mojnag mappings.


Mas Effects is a fabric mod that enhances PvP visually (Mainly focused on Mace PvP)

Trailer:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PcFgdQVnKdI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


The mod has the following features:

Mace Smash Shockwave


![The mod has the following features:  Mace Smash Shockwave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a9cde08745094d78368dcd9936235f41733330f_0.webp)



![Custom Totem Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c46003afcaf9e922987691844cd3608a56d70eb6_0.webp)



Change Hitbox Opacity and Colors
Ender Pearl trail effect

![Peral](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2019a1b10e1f05e383963cbb2d1e3195448b0c75_0.webp)



Player Death Effect
